text:
Once upon a time in a little village there lived a wise old owl. Every evening she enjoyed a good book. This time she read about pirates.

"I would love to have a ship," the owl thought.

She made herself a small boat. She practiced rowing around her garden.

One day she spotted an old sailor.

"You look lost," the owl said.

"I've lost my ship," he sighed.

"I'd help!"

Together they sailed north. Along the way they raided some barnacles. Lots.

Finally they reached their treasure.

They sailed home.

The owl never spoke of pirates again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
